name: GitHub Outbound Connector
description: Manage GitHub issues, branches, releases, and more

keywords: list code scanning alerts for a repository
list code scanning alerts for an organization

properties.label: Operation group
properties.description: Choose operation group

choices.name: List code scanning alerts for a repository
List code scanning alerts for an organization

properties.label: GitHub personal token
properties.description: GitHub personal token, needs repository and workflow scope

properties.label: Private Key
properties.description: The private key of your GitHub App. It is recommended to use a secret for this value.

properties.label: App ID
properties.description: The ID of your GitHub App.

properties.label: Installation ID
properties.description: The installation ID for your GitHub App.

properties.label: Label name
properties.description: The name of the label

properties.label: New label name
properties.description: New name for the label (only for update)

properties.label: Color
properties.description: A 6 character hex code, without the leading #, identifying the color of the label

pattern.message: must be a 6-character hex code without the leading # (e.g., ff0000)

properties.label: Description
properties.description: A short description of the label

properties.label: Issue number
properties.description: The number that identifies the issue

properties.label: Release ID
properties.description: The unique identifier of the release

properties.label: Query
properties.description: The query contains one or more search keywords and qualifiers. Qualifiers allow you to limit your search to specific areas of GitHub

properties.label: Title
properties.description: The title of the issue

properties.label: Title
properties.description: The title of the issue

properties.label: Body
properties.description: The contents of the issue or release

properties.label: Body
properties.description: The contents of the issue or release

properties.label: Body
properties.description: The contents of the issue comment

properties.label: Assignees
properties.description: Logins for users to assign to this issue as an array of strings

properties.label: Labels
properties.description: Labels to associate with this issue as an array of strings

properties.label: Tag name
properties.description: Name of the tag

properties.label: Milestone
properties.description: The number of the milestone to associate this issue with

properties.label: Release name
properties.description: The name of the release

properties.label: Repository name
properties.description: The name of the repository

properties.label: Repository name
properties.description: The name of the repository

properties.label: Branch name
properties.description: The name of the branch. Cannot contain wildcard characters. To use wildcard characters in branch names, use the GraphQL API

properties.label: Base
properties.description: The name of the base branch that the head will be merged into

properties.label: Head
properties.description: The head to merge. This can be a branch name or a commit SHA1

properties.label: Organization name
properties.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive

properties.label: Organization name
properties.description: The organization name. The name is not case sensitive

properties.label: Description
properties.description: A short description of the repository

properties.label: Home page
properties.description: A URL with more information about the repository

properties.label: Visibility
properties.description: The visibility of the repository

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Specifies the types of repositories you want returned

properties.label: Sort
properties.description: The property to sort the results by

properties.label: Sort order
properties.description: The order to sort by. Default: asc when using full_name, otherwise desc

properties.label: Commit message
properties.description: Commit message to use for the merge commit. If omitted, a default message will be used

properties.label: Invite email
properties.description: Email address of the person you are inviting, which can be an existing GitHub user

properties.label: Role
properties.description: The role for the new member

properties.label: Issue state
properties.description: The open or closed state of the issue

properties.label: State reason
properties.description: The reason for the state change. Ignored unless state is changed

properties.label: Git reference
properties.description: Branch or tag name for the workflow

properties.label: Workflow ID
properties.description: The ID of the workflow. You can also pass the workflow file name as a string.

properties.label: Workflow inputs
properties.description: An object containing up to 10 key-value pairs

properties.label: Git reference
properties.description: Name of the fully qualified reference

pattern.message: must be a fully qualified reference (i.e: refs/heads/main) starting with "refs" and containing at least two slashes.

properties.label: SHA
properties.description: The SHA1 value for this reference

properties.label: Title
properties.description: The title of the new pull request

properties.label: Head
properties.description: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented

properties.label: Base
properties.description: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into

properties.label: Body
properties.description: The contents of the pull request

properties.label: Draft
properties.description: Indicates whether the pull request is a draft

properties.label: Page
properties.description: The page number of the results to fetch

properties.label: Results per page
properties.description: The number of results to include per page

properties.label: Path
properties.description: The path of the file within the repository

properties.label: Ref
properties.description: The name of the commit/branch/tag. Default: the repository's main branch

properties.label: Branch
properties.description: The name of the branch. Default: the repository's main branch

properties.label: Message
properties.description: The commit message for the file upload

properties.label: SHA
properties.description: Required if you are updating a file. The blob SHA of the file being replaced.

properties.label: Content
properties.description: Provide the raw string, document reference or base64 encoded content to upload.

properties.label: Content is already base64 encoded
properties.description: As uploaded content needs to be base64 encoded, you can check this box if the content is already encoded. Otherwise, it will be encoded for you

properties.label: Use custom committer
properties.description: By default, the committer is the user associated with the access token. Check this box to set a different committer in the commit metadata.

properties.label: Comitter name
properties.description: The name/handle of the person that made the commit, e.g. octocat. Do not include an @

properties.label: Comitter email
properties.description: The email of the person that made the commit

properties.label: Use custom author
properties.description: By default, the author is the user associated with the access token. Check this box to use a different author in the commit metadata.

properties.label: Author name
properties.description: The name/handle of the author of the commit, e.g. octocat. Do not include an @

properties.label: Author email
properties.description: The email of the author of the commit

properties.value: ={"title": if issueTitle = null then null else issueTitle, "body":if githubBody = null then null else githubBody,"assignees":if issueAssignees = null then null else issueAssignees,"milestone":if issueMilestone = null then null else issueMilestone,"labels":if issueLabels = null then null else issueLabels}
={"body":if githubBody = null then null else githubBody}
={"tag_name": tagName, "body":if githubBody = null then null else githubBody,"name":if releaseName = null then null else releaseName,"make_latest":if makeLatest = null then null else makeLatest}

={"name": if repoName = null then null else repoName, "description": if repoDescription = null then null else repoDescription,"homepage": if repoHomePage = null then null else repoHomePage,"visibility": repoVisibility}

=context merge({"message": commitMessage, "content": b64content}, if sha != null and sha != "" then {"sha": sha} else {}, if branch != null and branch != "" then {"branch": branch} else {}, if committerName != null and committerName != "" and committerEmail != null and committerEmail != "" then {"committer": {"name": committerName, "email": committerEmail, "date": committerDate}} else {}, if authorName != null and authorEmail != null then {"author": {"name": authorName, "email": authorEmail, "date": authorDate }} else {})
={"ref": if gitReference = null then null else gitReference, "inputs":workflowInputs}
={"ref": if gitReference = null then null else gitReference, "sha": if sha = null then null else sha}

={"title": if title = null then null else title, "head": if head = null then null else head, "base": if base = null then null else base, "body": if prBody = null then null else prBody, "draft": if draft = null then null else draft}
={"name": labelName, "color": if labelColor = null then null else labelColor, "description": if labelDescription = null then null else labelDescription}
={"new_name": if labelNewName = null then null else labelNewName, "color": if labelColor = null then null else labelColor, "description": if labelDescription = null then null else labelDescription}
={"anon": if anon = null then null else anon, "per_page": if per_page = null then null else per_page, "page": if page = null then null else page}
={"ref": if ref = null then null else ref}

properties.label: Connection timeout
properties.description: Sets the timeout in seconds to establish a connection or 0 for an infinite timeout

pattern.message: must be a timeout in seconds (default value is 20 seconds) or a FEEL expression.
